name: directory layout: the ~38 ship-at-install rule files are distributed across at least 3 distinct namespace folders (not concentrated in one)
command: root="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"; distinct=$(find "$root" -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 3 -name '*.yaml' -not -path '*/_operator/*' -not -path '*/_community/*' -not -path '*/_meta/*' 2>/dev/null | awk -F/ '{print $(NF-1)}' | sort -u | wc -l | tr -d ' '); [ "$distinct" -ge 3 ] && echo "ok distinct=$distinct" 1>&2 || { echo "FAIL distinct=$distinct expected >=3" 1>&2; exit 1; }
